技术文档
附录一
计算校验和
以下为计算校验和的代码段：
const char* CalcChecksum(const char* buffer, uint32 len, char buffChecksum[4])
{
uint8 checksum = 0;
uint32 i = 0;
for (i = 0; i < len; i++)
{
checksum += (uint8)buffer[i];
}
sprintf(buffChecksum, “%03d”, checksum );
return bufCheckSum;
}
